title: deyeuxia royleana
intro: Deyeuxia royleana, also known as the Himalayan grass or Indian grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Deyeuxia royleana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried or made into a decoction for use in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
